title: Map: Development of Porth Harbour (2000 vs today)
description: The plans below show a harbour in 2000 and how it looks today. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
guide_html:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Porth Harbour (2000 vs Today)
1. Giải thích đề

Sơ đồ cho thấy sự thay đổi của một cảng biển từ năm 2000 đến hiện tại. → Dạng: map – changes over time

2. Introduction (paraphrase)

Giữ: Porth Harbour – 2000 – today. Dùng: shows → illustrates / compares / changes → developments / transformations

3. Overview (ý chính)
  • Cảng được phát triển mạnh về du lịch và dịch vụ
  • Số lượng dock tăng lên
  • Xuất hiện các tiện ích mới như cafés, shops và hotel
  • Một số khu vực được tái bố trí → tổng thể hiện đại và hướng tới khách du lịch hơn
4. Chia BODY
BODY 1 – Khu trung tâm (bến cảng)
  • 2000: Có 2 dock / Passenger ferries / Lifeboat gần bờ
  • Hiện tại: Số dock tăng lên 3 / Passenger ferries và Lifeboat vẫn giữ vị trí tương tự
BODY 2 – Khu bên trái
  • 2000: Marina / Fishing boats / 2 car parks / showers & toilets
  • Hiện tại: Fishing boats và marina đổi vị trí / Thêm showers & toilets mới / Cafés & shops mới
BODY 3 – Khu bên phải
  • 2000: Public beach / Castle (disused) / con đường đơn giản
  • Hiện tại: Castle → hotel / Road mở rộng dẫn tới hotel / Public beach được giữ
5. Gợi ý từ vựng
  • be expanded / be replaced by / be relocated / be upgraded / tourist facilities / waterfront

The maps illustrate changes to Porth Harbour between 2000 and today.

Overall, the harbour has been developed for tourism, with more docks, new commercial facilities, and a hotel, while some original features have been relocated or expanded.

In 2000, the western side contained a marina for private yachts, fishing boats, and two car parks with nearby showers and toilets. A single dock extended into the harbour for passenger ferries. To the south, a lifeboat station was located along a curved road, and a disused castle stood on the eastern side near a public beach.

Today, the harbour has been significantly upgraded. The number of docks has increased to three. Cafés and shops have been added near the marina, which has been moved slightly south, while fishing boats are now positioned further north. Additional showers and toilets have been introduced on the western side. The disused castle has been replaced by a hotel, and the road has been extended to provide direct access to it. The lifeboat remains in a similar location, and the public beach is still present.
